close_reason: Added .nvmrc, reinstalled with Node 20, build passes

title: BUG: Spicy filters don't match spec
description: Spec has 11 topic-specific filters (pro_crimen, antecedentes, pro_aborto, anti_aborto, nueva_constitucion, privatizar_petroperu, defender_petroperu, pro_matrimonio, anti_genero, mano_dura, congresistas_reelectos). Current implementation has 8 generic filters.
close_reason: Updated to 11 spec-matching filters with categories

title: BUG: setState in useEffect lint errors
description: 4 pages call setState synchronously in useEffect: controversial, filtros, mi-voto, tendencias. Also unused PartyCard import in filtros.
close_reason: Fixed setState in useEffect: async/cancelled pattern + useSyncExternalStore for localStorage

title: BUG: Quiz questions are generic, not from spec

close_reason: Rewrote quiz with 15 spec questions, party positions, Euclidean matching. Deployed to prod, verified live.
